title: A Very Good Solvent For Making Liquid Phase Exfoliated Graphene
description:
Just an update on solvents for LPE - liquid phase exfoliation. Type 10 cleaner it is a mix of Monocarboxylic acid esters - the msds lists

ethyl aceate 70-90%
naphta 10-20%
ethanol, 2,2'-iminobis-, N-coco alkyl derivative 0.1-1% - so that is the surfactant
n-Hexane 0.1-1%

It does a very good job
